current.content_terms_conditions: I agree with the terms and conditions
current.alert_terms_conditions:
• Welcome to ZUVĒ BEAUTY (the “Website”), an e-commerce platform operated by ZUVĒ BEAUTY, having its registered office at TARA 128, Santhosh Bhavan, Bosco Nagar, Vellanikkara KAU P.O Kerala, Thrissur, 680656, India. The Website provides access to products, content, and related services offered by ZUVĒ BEAUTY. By accessing or using this Website, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. Please review them carefully before making a purchase.

  • Age Disclaimer: By accessing or using the ZUVĒ BEAUTY website, you confirm that you are 18 years of age or older. If you are under 18, use of this website and purchase of products should be done under parental or guardian supervision.

  • Product Usage: ZUVĒ BEAUTY press-on nails are intended for personal, external use only. Customers are advised to follow all application and removal instructions provided. ZUVĒ BEAUTY is not responsible for allergic reactions, sensitivities, or issues resulting from improper use. We recommend a patch test before full application, especially for users with sensitive skin. This product is a cosmetic accessory and does not claim any medical or therapeutic benefits.

  • Pricing & Payments: Payments on the ZUVĒ BEAUTY website are securely processed through Razorpay. We accept payments via UPI, credit cards, debit cards, net banking, and wallets. All transactions are subject to verification and authorization by the respective payment service providers. All prices on the website are listed in Indian Rupees (INR). ZUVĒ BEAUTY reserves the right to update product pricing, offers, or availability at any time without prior notice. Orders must be paid in full at checkout for processing and confirmation.

  • Shipping & Delivery: Orders are generally processed within 1–2 business days. Standard delivery timelines may vary by delivery location and courier partner. Shipping timelines are estimates and may be affected by external factors beyond our control. Delivery usually takes 4 to 7 working days.

  • Returns & Refunds: For information regarding returns, refunds, or replacements, please refer to the Returns & Refunds section available on our website.

  • Adhesive Disclosure: Where applicable, nail adhesive is provided for cosmetic use only. Adhesive usage may not be suitable for all users. Customers with known sensitivities or allergies should exercise discretion before use.

  • Customer Support: For order-related queries, concerns, or assistance, customers may contact us at support@zuvebeauty.com or Phone: +91-9995362285.

  • Order Concerns: If your order arrives damaged or incorrect, please contact ZUVĒ BEAUTY within 24 hours of delivery with your order details and a clear unboxing video of the issue. Requests received after this window may not be eligible for review.

  • Intellectual Property: All content on this website, including designs, images, text, logos, and branding, is the exclusive property of ZUVĒ BEAUTY. Unauthorized use, reproduction, or distribution is strictly prohibited.

  • Privacy: ZUVĒ BEAUTY respects your privacy. Any personal information collected through the website is used solely for order processing, communication, and customer support, in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

  • Governing Law & Jurisdiction: These Terms & Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of India.

Updates to Terms: ZUVĒ BEAUTY reserves the right to update or modify these Terms & Conditions at any time. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of any revised terms.
current.mess_currency: All charges are billed in [original_currency]. While the content of your cart is currently displayed in [current_currency], the checkout will use [original_currency] at the most current exchange rate.

settings.title: 01. The order
settings.content:
When do I receive my order?
When placing the order, a day of shipment is indicated. After the order has been placed, the same delivery time will also be stated on the order confirmation. It is therefore never possible that during the order, the shipping day on the website, is different than on the order confirmation.

I now see the longer delivery time of (a part of) my order. How can I cancel it?
If the order has a longer delivery time than you had previously seen, it is of course possible to cancel (a part of) the order. For this you can contact our customer service. They will cancel the order for you. The purchase amount will be back on your bank account within two working days. When an order has already been shipped, it can no longer be cancelled.


When will I receive the invoice for my order?
When you have paid for the order, you will not automatically receive an invoice for your order. If you wish to receive an invoice, this can be done in two ways.The first way is through your account at our store. When you log in to your account you can see your orders and download the invoice.
